name: @pokechamps/control
description: Control output adapter: turn the engine's recommended action into Nintendo Switch controller input. The mirror of @pokechamps/vision (the input adapter). Software-first scaffold — a MockBackend + dry-run today; a serial-driven microcontroller (ESP32+PABotBase2 / wired Pico) backend when hardware is wired. Confirm-before-press by default. Windows can't be a Bluetooth-Classic HID peripheral, hence the MCU path — see docs/notes/future-directions.md.
